* Dive into a vibrant NFT collection where art and nature meet in a colorful celebration of fruits from around the world.
* Discover unique digital art that brings fruit to life with vivid detail, bold colors, and refreshing creativity.
* Bring a fresh, lively energy to your digital space with art designed to brighten any collection.
* Explore a world of breathtaking colors and find the perfect, one-of-a-kind addition to your NFT portfolio.
* Created by a passionate family team, AiFrUiT beautifully blends natural beauty with digital innovation.
* Join the AiFrUiT community on Discord and Telegram for exclusive previews, updates, and a chance to make your digital world a bit more colorful.
* Start your collection today—available now on OpenSea and OKX across Polygon and Base!

* Korea Chain leads the environmentally conscious digital future with transaction speeds faster than your credit card.
* Experience unmatched speed and instant finality with a blockchain standard designed to process 20,000 transactions per second.
* Secure your slice of the future with the world's first AI-managed, self-governing blockchain network.
* Invest once and earn for years with a direct share of all blockchain earnings for NFT holders.
* Participate in the world's first 100% fair airdrop—where every NFT you own guarantees an equal share of rewards.
* Buy two NFTs and get one free to maximize your rewards during this limited-time pre-launch event.
* Buy digital assets from any blockchain but hold them all in one single, secure place with the NFT-Chain cross-chain layer.
* Trade and collect with peace of mind on a fully audited, hardened, and battle-tested smart contract architecture.
* Access an open digital supercomputer built to empower businesses, creators, and individuals worldwide.
* Partner with a proven team behind some of the most successful, record-breaking global NFT collections.
